topics.title: Right to Mental Healthcare
topics.description: Access mental health services in India.

rights: Right to access mental health services
Right to affordable and basic healthcare
Right to dignity and humane treatment

faqs.mental harm: Mental harm includes emotional abuse, threats, humiliation, fear, and psychological distress.
faqs.who can access: Every citizen has the right to access mental healthcare services.
faqs.is it free: Basic services should be accessible and affordable.

rights: Equal treatment regardless of mental condition
Protection from discrimination in employment and society

faqs.discrimination: Any unfair treatment due to mental health condition is a violation of this right.

topics.title: Right to Privacy & Confidentiality
topics.description: Your mental health data must remain private.

rights: Right to keep medical records private
No unauthorized sharing of health data

faqs.privacy: Doctors and institutions must not share your mental health data without consent.

actions: File complaint if data is leaked

topics.title: File Domestic Violence Complaint
legal_basis: Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, 2005

rights: Right to protection from domestic violence

faqs.how to report: You can file a complaint with a Protection Officer or Police.

rights: Right to legal protection from abuser

faqs.what is protection order: A legal order preventing the abuser from contacting or approaching you.

actions: File case in court through lawyer or Protection Officer

faqs.who gets free aid: Women, children, and low-income individuals are eligible.
